tasks.title: Implement Project Initialization Logic
tasks.context_slice: Build the functionality for `sf project-init` in `lib/cli/init.js`. It must create the `./.agents/` directory, write an empty `.agent-state.json`, create a `.agent-version` lockfile reading from the global current version, and scaffold a default `.agent-pipeline.yml`.

tasks.title: Scaffold Local MCP and Memory Dirs
tasks.context_slice: Update `lib/cli/init.js` to also create `./.agents/custom-roles/` and `./.agents/memory-events/`. It must also drop an `mcp-custom.example.json` to guide developers on configuring local MCPs securely.

tasks.title: Wire CLI to Init Handler
tasks.context_slice: Update `bin/sf.js` to map the `project-init` command to the new initialization logic in `lib/cli/init.js`.
